regional_summary_6h.headline: Israel strikes Tehran; PMF fighter killed near Iraq-Syria border
bullets: Israeli forces executed a strike on Tehran amid ongoing US searches for a missing pilot.
A Popular Mobilization Forces fighter was killed in a strike near the Iraq-Syria border.
Cross-border escalation risks intensify following direct military action in Iran and Iraq.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor for retaliatory strikes from Iranian proxies in Iraq and Syria.
